name: Community Message Security Audit
serviceDescription: Agentic Community Ops audits Web3 community messages using a deterministic security engine and AI-assisted support layer. It detects scams, phishing, fake administrators, wallet threats and transaction issues, then produces explainable risk verdicts, safe reply suggestions and escalation actions.
input: A project description, official documentation and up to 25 community messages.
deliverable: Structured risk levels, triggered rules, suggested replies, escalations and a community risk report.
safetyGuarantees: Deterministic security rules run before AI analysis.
Triggered rules include stable rule IDs and matched evidence.
Official links must come from the project profile, not community messages.
Seed phrases, private keys, passwords and OTP codes are never requested.
Financial, missing-fund, legal and account-security cases are escalated.
knownLimitations: No OKX payment integration is implemented yet.
Local JSON storage is used for project knowledge-base data.
Batch/report dashboard state is currently browser-local.
